title: Secure first confirmed model/consortium/hub partner
context: Elyos's bar is 'delivered, not merged': a card that no one accepts is not a delivered outcome. Currently all tasks carry verifiedNeed:false because no model maintainer, hub, or consortium has confirmed they will accept contributed model cards. This task converts the M0 outreach effort (outreach-008) into a formal first confirmed partnership — a named partner whose tasks can then be updated to verifiedNeed:true. Depends on outreach-008.
objective: Secure at least one named model maintainer, hub, or consortium that formally confirms they will review and accept contributed model cards from this project, and document the contribution mechanism and partnership agreement.
acceptanceCriteria: A named model maintainer, hub (e.g. Hugging Face, BioImage Model Zoo, MONAI Model Zoo), or cancer-AI consortium formally confirms they will review and accept contributed model cards from this project.
The contribution mechanism is documented: how cards are submitted (HF model-card PR / repo PR / Zenodo metadata record / portal upload) and the partner's review/acceptance process.
Partnership agreement or confirmation (email, GitHub issue, forum post, or written statement) is recorded and linked in a committed document.
The tasks associated with this partner's models are identified and updated with verifiedNeed:true and requestor set to the confirmed partner.
The committed document records the partner name, contact, contribution channel, and the permalink evidence of their confirmation.
resources: PLAN.md — Executive summary, Partner org, M1 exit criteria
output: A committed document recording the first confirmed model/consortium/hub partner, their agreement to accept cards, the contribution mechanism, and the evidence permalink; associated tasks updated to verifiedNeed:true.
